subcodes.first_line: O my kind-hearted friends! The fire of your longing is burning with such intensity that its warmth hath left its trace upon the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان من آتش اشتیاقتان چنان شعله ور است که حرارتش در آفاق اثر نموده
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @love as fire, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wisdom [hikmat], @law of pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution
